zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Ashe ,MP於1420年出生在英國戴文洛利時，他的父親Richard Ashe de Esse60歲，母親Anne Greer20歲。他於大約1438年與Alice Wythecombe在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他在英國被列為knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household。他去世於1495年在英國戴文索福頓享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Ashe ,MP于1420年出生在英国戴文洛利时，他的父亲Richard Ashe de Esse60岁，母亲Anne Greer20岁。他于大约1438年与Alice Wythecombe在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他在英国被列为knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household。他去世于1495年在英国戴文索福頓享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Ash   1, found mainly in Ireland.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , a variant of   Ash   2.

History: This is the name of a prominent NC family; John Baptist Ashe settled in NC before 1720. It is not known where he came from: his personal name suggests that he may have been of French extraction, perhaps originally named Jean-Baptiste Dufresne.

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Ashe ,MP was born in 1420, in Throwleigh, Devon, England, his father, Richard Ashe de Esse, was 60 and his mother, Anne Greer, was 20. He married Alice Wythecombe about 1438, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. His occupation is listed as knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household in England. He died in 1495, in Sowton, Devon, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Ashe ,MP est né en 1420, à Throwleigh, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Ashe d’Esse, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Anne Greer, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Wythecombe environ 1438, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household à Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1495, à Sowton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Ashe ,MP 1420 in Throwleigh, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Ashe de Esse 60 und seine Mutter Anne Greer 20. Er hat um 1438 in England Alice Wythecombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household in England aufgeführt. Er starb 1495 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Sowton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Ashe ,MP è nato il nel 1420 nel Throwleigh, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Ashe de Esse, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Anne Greer, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice Wythecombe circa 1438, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household nel England. Morì nel 1495, nel Sowton, Devon, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Ashe ,MPが1420年にイギリスデボンスロウレイグで生まれた時，父Richard Ashe de Esseは60歳，母Anne Greerは20歳であった。約1438年にイギリスでAlice Wythecombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。イギリスでの職業はknight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's householdと記録されている。彼は1495年にイギリスデボンソウトンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Ashe ,MP(이)가 1420년 영국 데폰 스로우리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Ashe de Esse(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Greer(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국에서 Alice Wythecombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household이었다. 그는 1495년 영국 데폰 소우턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Ashe ,MP nasceu em 1420, em Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Ashe de Esse, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Anne Greer, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Wythecombe aproximadamente 1438, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1495, em Sowton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Ashe ,MP родился в 1420 г. в местности троулиг, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Ashe de Esse было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Greer, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Wythecombe около 1438 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.  Он работал по профессии knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household в местности Англия. Он умер в 1495 г. в местности соутон, девон, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Ashe ,MP nació en 1420, en Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Ashe de Esse, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Anne Greer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice Wythecombe aproximadamente 1438, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era knight, mp, deputy to the steward of king henry vi's household en Inglaterra. Murió en 1495, en Sowton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
